name: credential-manager-mcp
description: MCP server for credential manager. Features issue credential, verify credential, revoke credential. From MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: issue_credential
tools.description: Issue a verifiable credential with claims, signature, and expiry. Claims should be JSON string.

tools.name: verify_credential
tools.description: Verify a credential's validity — checks existence, signature, expiry, and revocation status.

tools.name: revoke_credential
tools.description: Revoke a credential. Adds to revocation list and marks as inactive.

tools.name: list_credentials
tools.description: List credentials with optional filters by subject and type.

tools.name: audit_credential_usage
tools.description: Get audit statistics on credential issuance, verification, and revocation.
